title: Rimcee system

'''Rimcee system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Braxant sector/Legends|Braxant sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

It was located in the [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial space]] towards the end of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It contained an [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] base called [[Rimcee Station]] which, in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], was used to imprison [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Meizh Vermel]], who was held as a political prisoner by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra|Disra]] during his bid against [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon's]] [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|peace proposal]] in hopes of inciting civil war within the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] over the [[Caamas Document Crisis|Caamas Document]].<ref name="VotF" />
